title: epidendrum costatum
intro: Epidendrum costatum is a species of orchid native to Central and South America, known for its unique and delicate appearance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Epidendrum costatum include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its flowers or roots in water, and it can also be used as a tea to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
